next_action: Attach the Dataverse download JSONs, ReadMe/appendix scripts, and original-study data files as child artifacts under lead_harvest:covid_online_2021; inspect the manifest/file list for reusable multi-row original/replication result tables and route those specific tables to result-table extraction.
preferred_source_family_name: The Generalizability of Online Experiments Conducted During the COVID-19 Pandemic
reason: The cluster is not Many Labs 2 despite the hint. The artifact names align with the Peyton, Huber, and Coppock COVID-era online-experiment replication package, which has open data/materials and a Harvard Dataverse replication-data DOI. This is a reusable multi-study replication package, but the listed nodes are child files/manifests rather than a new root source-family row.
sources_checked: Cambridge Core article DOI 10.1017/XPS.2021.17; Dataverse DOI 10.7910/DVN/38UTBF
web exact searches for gilens_original/psv_original/tw_original/pwk_original and COVID online replication package
